query:
SELECT poNumber,
       SUM(CASE WHEN archivedAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeProducts,
       SUM(CASE WHEN archivedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS archivedProducts,
       MIN(createdAt) AS firstCreatedAt,
       MAX(updatedAt) AS lastUpdatedAt
FROM products
WHERE poNumber IN (
  'TEST-A1-IMEI-1778749381829',
  'PO-KPI-WRITE-1778749381827',
  'PO-20260514-04',
  'PO-STOCK-BLOCK-1778749390586',
  'PO-KPI-FALLBACK-1778749392323-fallback',
  'PO-BACKUP-EDGE-1778749392638',
  'PO-20260514-05',
  'PO-20260514-07',
  'PO-20260514-12',
  'TEST-A1-DUP-GUARD-1778749412041',
  'TEST-A1-NAME-1778749416728',
  'TEST-A1-SN-1778749418491',
  'PO-KPI-MISSING-GOOGLE-1778749418051-missing-google',
  'PO-KPI-D-SAMPLING-PASS-1778750585732-d-sampling-pass',
  'PO-KPI-MISSING-GOOGLE-1778750592526-missing-google',
  'PO-KPI-IDEMPOTENT-1778750598137-idempotent'
)
GROUP BY poNumber
ORDER BY poNumber;

SELECT poNumber, deletedProducts, deletedTasks, resultStatus, createdAt
FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs
WHERE poNumber IN (
  'TEST-A1-IMEI-1778749381829',
  'PO-KPI-WRITE-1778749381827',
  'PO-20260514-04',
  'PO-STOCK-BLOCK-1778749390586',
  'PO-KPI-FALLBACK-1778749392323-fallback',
  'PO-BACKUP-EDGE-1778749392638',
  'PO-20260514-05',
  'PO-20260514-07',
  'PO-20260514-12',
  'TEST-A1-DUP-GUARD-1778749412041',
  'TEST-A1-NAME-1778749416728',
  'TEST-A1-SN-1778749418491',
  'PO-KPI-MISSING-GOOGLE-1778749418051-missing-google',
  'PO-KPI-D-SAMPLING-PASS-1778750585732-d-sampling-pass',
  'PO-KPI-MISSING-GOOGLE-1778750592526-missing-google',
  'PO-KPI-IDEMPOTENT-1778750598137-idempotent'
)
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
